title: Raw UGC Realization Reaction
description: A raw selfie video of a young Slavic girl slowly realizing she forgot to cancel a free trial, captured with real-life UGC energy.

prompt.concept: Raw selfie video of a Russian/Slavic girl in her early 20s. She's sitting in her car or at her kitchen table and slowly realizes something — like she just remembered she forgot to cancel a free trial. The realization creeps in across 4 seconds. Pure UGC, captured-in-real-life energy.

character.hair: ash blonde hair, slightly greasy at the roots like day-3 hair, half-up clip, frizzy strands at the temples
character.skin: very fair skin with cool undertones, real texture with visible pores, faint redness around nose, dry patch on one cheek, no foundation, just chapstick
character.eyes: pale grey-blue eyes, slightly tired, no mascara, faint dark circles
character.expression: blank zoned-out face slowly transforms into 'oh no' realization, in stages

wardrobe.top: worn dove grey crewneck sweatshirt, slightly pilled fabric, sleeves pushed up unevenly
wardrobe.nails: bare short nails, no polish, slightly bitten

setting.location: either her car (driver's seat, parked) or kitchen table — choose car for stronger UGC feel
details: if car: seatbelt visible, dashboard slightly out of focus, gray winter daylight outside windshield
if kitchen: cluttered counter behind, half-eaten food, mug, crumbs, real apartment mess

camera.shot: selfie medium close-up, face and upper chest
camera.angle: phone held in one hand at chest height, slight tilt, not straight
camera.movement: very subtle handheld drift, breathing-level shake

lighting.key: flat overcast daylight or dim apartment ambient — nothing flattering
lighting.catchlights: faint, possibly just window or windshield reflection

prompt.micro_idle_before_reaction: 0.0-1.2s genuine blank zone-out, no acting, slow involuntary blink, mouth slightly open

action_timeline.beat: Vacant, zoned-out stare. Eyes unfocused. One slow tired blink. Mouth slightly slack. She's not reacting yet — she's just existing.
Something clicks: eyes sharpen, refocus, blink twice quickly, brows start to pull up. Lips move slightly like she's mouthing 'wait...'
Full realization: eyes widen, mouth opens about an inch, sharp inhale through nose, head pulls back slightly, says quietly 'oh no' or 'shit'
Hand comes up partially into frame to rub her forehead or cover her mouth, eyes go off-camera as she's now mentally calculating. Self-talks under breath.

gesture_rules.movement_style: Slow biological progression. Each beat lags slightly behind the last like a real cognitive process.
realism_ticks: real lip movement of mouthing words
hand drifts up unconsciously, not on a planned beat
looks away from camera at the end (real people don't perform to camera)

no_text_no_graphics.note: Raw clip only. No overlays, no logos, no UI, no captions, no watermarks.
